items.title: Lansing pauses data center bids for 182 days over jobs and water fears
items.dek: Council approved the moratorium 7-1 after residents warned it could cost tax revenue and investment while others demanded rules on emissions, noise and PFAS.
items.judge_note: New concrete action: Lansing Council voted 7-1 for a 182-day moratorium — a different municipality taking a specific vote, not covered in existing stories.

items.title: Saline Fights $16B Data Center Over Water and Farmland
items.dek: Township lost rezoning lawsuit, allowing Oracle-OpenAI project to break ground with $14M in benefits; residents say big tech steamrolls locals on utilities and land.
items.judge_note: New development: township lost rezoning lawsuit allowing project to proceed with $14M benefits package, a concrete legal/procedural outcome not previously repor
